exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 518 franchised hotels listed by state with entity name, hotel name, address. PII present (entity names).

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest During 2024
exhibits.notes: Lists franchisees who left the system during 2024.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Cherry Bekaert LLP. Balance sheets (2024, 2023), income statements (2024, 2023, 2022), cash flows (2024, 2023, 2022), and notes. Clean opinion.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: Sample franchise agreement. Includes Addendum, Shared Facilities Addendum.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific modifications to the franchise agreement.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Form of note for development incentives; contingent liability that reduces annually.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Required guarantor signs this; may include spouse.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: Governs OnQ access, hardware/software support, maintenance, and related IT services.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents — Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for the confidential Standards manual.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise regulators and appointed agents.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: State-specific modifications to the FDD. Includes California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin addenda.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: StiR Creative Collective restaurant brand program addendum. Not applicable to Homewood Suites.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Sample lender comfort letter and assignment forms. Processing fee: $3,500 (letter) or $1,500 (assignment).

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists 14 registration states and their effective dates (dates blank in this copy).

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two detachable receipt copies for franchisee signature.
